title: Banduty's Roleplay
body:
![Banduty's Roleplay Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9978a311f1f4cace2a22d49e840930e7d7ff4f2.png)

Compatible with Mod Menu

# Features

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
## ITEMS

### Judge Hammer: 
- Makes a bang sound.

### Police Baton: 
- Hit to give slowness effect. Right Click for Jail.

### Handcuffs: 
- Restrict the movement of other player.

### Anti-God Handcuffs: 
- Restrict the movement of a player in creative and change his game mode to survival.

### Handcuffs Key: 
- The key to free them of the Handcuffs.

### Poseidon's Talon: 
- Creates a Shockwave.

### Dune Caller: 
- Invoke a Sandstorm.

### Spectral Scanner: 
- Detects invisible players.

### HealKit:
**Blindness:** 90 seconds - 0.1% chance |
**Weakness:** 40 seconds - 20% chance |
**Nausea:** 25 seconds - 5% chance |
**Fire Resistance:** 90 seconds - 100% chance |
**Instant Health:** 100% chance

### InvKit:
**1st stage:**
- Invisibility: 20 seconds

- Speed III: 20 seconds

- Weakness IV: 20 seconds

**2nd stage:**
- Weakness II: 30 seconds

- Mining Fatigue I: 60 seconds

- Slowness III: 40 seconds

- Instant Damage

### Coins:
They can be earned by killing mobs or mining ores. They can also be placed as a block.

## ARMORS:
### Police Set:
**Stamina:**
Early Game Stamina System:
- Speed Boost III
- Duration: 60 ticks (3 seconds)
- Cooldown: 1200 ticks (60 seconds)
- Minimum Limit: 60 ticks (3 seconds)
- Additional Effects: None

Mid-Game Stamina System (Enter Nether):
- Speed Boost IV
- Duration: 120 ticks (6 seconds)
- Cooldown: 900 ticks (45 seconds)
- Minimum Limit: 60 ticks (3 seconds)
- Additional Effects: Jump Boost II | Resistance I
 

End Game Stamina System (Kill Dragon):
- Speed Boost V
- Duration: 180 ticks (9 seconds)
- Cooldown: 600 ticks (30 seconds)
- Minimum Limit: 60 ticks (3 seconds)
- Additional Effects: Jump Boost III | Resistance II |Regeneration I
 

### Protection Set:
- Remove Poison Effect

### Masks:
- Add Invisibility
- If Handcuffed, doesn't make effect
</details>

# Languages
- **English** (US) 

- **Español** (España)

- **Français** (France)

Compatible with Mod Menu

# FAQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
### Q: Forge version?
**A:** Not at the moment, there is a lot more roleplay's mod for forge to enjoy. You can try Roleplay+ by Marzales23.

 

### Q: Can I use your mod in my modpack?
**A:** Yes.

 

### Q: I have a suggestion, where can I write you?
**A:** Curseforge comments, Discord, Twitter, or Instagram. If it's on Discord, I'll check it out faster.

 

### Q: There is any item that I can't get in survival?
**A:** No. Except that they're disabled in ModConfigs.

 

### Q: Can I use your code as reference for my mod?

**A:** Despite the fact that the mod's license is ARR, you can use Banduty's Roleplay code as reference. But, please, don’t just do plain Ctrl+C → Ctrl+V. It isn't allowed to port itself. If there's any discontinued or non-supported version, you can contact me to confirm it, you can make a port for that version.

</details>

# Known Issues
None at the moment
